/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/obj/val.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/util/check.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/parse/DreamBaseListener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/parse/DreamLexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/parse/DreamListener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/parse/DreamParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/parse/DreamParserListenerRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/obj/Package.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/obj/Global.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/util/parse_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/common/reserved.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/gc/DataSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/gc/gc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/parse/DreamParserListener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/common/native_fun.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dream.dir/src/util/common_util.cpp.o -o dream  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib64 /usr/local/lib64/libantlr4-runtime.so /usr/lib64/libedit.so
